scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:agent
scripts.seed: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && node server/dist/seed.js
scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,agent --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w agent"
scripts.demo: npm run build && concurrently --names server,agent --prefix-colors blue,green "node server/dist/index.js" "node agent/dist/index.js"
